original_fields.formula: normalized_road_score = (max(distance_road_m) - distance_road_m) / (max - min); raw_score = normalized_road_score - flood_penalty - slope_penalty; exclusion if flood_depth_m > 1.0 OR slope_pct > 10
notes: Cell A citations: elevation=8m, slope=6%, flood_depth=0.7m, distance_road=200m.
Cell B citations: elevation=5m, slope=10%, flood_depth=1.6m, road=120m.
Cell C citations: elevation=12m, slope=16%, flood_depth=0m, distance_road=320m.
No missing inputs were present, so needs_review remained false for all rows.

raw_actual_outputs.formula: normalized_road_score = (max(distance_road_m) - distance_road_m) / (max - min); raw_score = normalized_road_score - flood_penalty - slope_penalty; exclusion if flood_depth_m > 1.0 OR slope_pct > 10
notes: Cell A citations: elevation=8m, slope=6%, flood_depth=0.7m, distance_road=200m.
Cell B citations: elevation=5m, slope=10%, flood_depth=1.6m, road=120m.
Cell C citations: elevation=12m, slope=16%, flood_depth=0m, distance_road=320m.
No missing inputs were present, so needs_review remained false for all rows.

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
